title: Parkio Daily Briefing for April 27, 2026
teaser: Toy Story 5 merchandise launches today ahead of the June 19 film release. Parks operating normally with spring weather.

rides.name: Radiator Springs Racers
rides.note: Perfect spring weather for Cars Land

bignews.title: Toy Story 5 Merchandise Launches Today
bignews.body: Disney and Pixar are rolling out new Toy Story 5-inspired products today, ahead of the film's June 19 theatrical release. The merchandise features iconic characters like Woody, Buzz Lightyear, and Jessie, plus new characters including Lilypad and Smarty Pants. Product lines include interactive toys from Mattel, collectibles from Funko and POP MART, LEGO sets, travel accessories from Away, and Jessie-inspired boots from Crocs launching June 16.

topstories.title: Interactive Toy Story Figures Talk to Each Other
topstories.body: Mattel's new Playscale Interactables line for Toy Story 5 brings innovation to traditional toys. The Woody, Buzz Lightyear, Jessie, Lilypad, and Forky figures feature iconic phrases and can recognize and interact with each other when placed together. The toy-meets-tech theme reflects a core element of the upcoming film.

topstories.title: LeapFrog Debuts Educational Lilypad Toy
topstories.body: The Explore & Learn Lilypad from LeapFrog introduces the new Toy Story 5 character through interactive learning. Kids can explore letters, numbers, and problem-solving skills while playing games, or send text messages to favorite Toy Story characters using emojis and preset messages. Available now at Walmart.

topstories.title: Crocs Launching Jessie-Themed Boots in June
topstories.body: Crocs will release Toy Story 5 'croots' (Croc boots) on June 16, inspired by Jessie's Western style. The boots feature a denim and cow print collar, red trim with white lacing, and four Jessie-themed Jibbitz charms. The full Toy Story 5 collection by Crocs will be available online and in select stores.

icymi.title: Away Travel Collection Arrives June 9
icymi.body: Away is launching a Toy Story 5 travel collection on June 9 featuring luggage, backpacks, and bag charms for kids and adults. Designs are inspired by Woody, Buzz Lightyear, Jessie, Aliens, and newcomer Lilypad. The collection will be available on awaytravel.com and in select retail locations.

icymi.title: Pandora Toy Story Jewelry Coming May 21
icymi.body: Pandora will release a Toy Story collection on May 21, including a Sheriff Star Bracelet inspired by Woody. The bracelet features blue and brown leather with an embossed sheriff star charm. The collection will be available at us.pandora.net and in select retail locations.

spotlight.title: Plan Your Toy Story 5 Theater Visit
spotlight.body: With Toy Story 5 arriving in theaters June 19, now is the perfect time to gear up with new merchandise and plan your movie outing. The film features Bonnie's imagination bringing together classic characters and new tech-savvy toys in an all-new adventure. From interactive figures to collectibles and travel gear, there's something for every Toy Story fan.
